message:
perf(mvcc): PageTxnState consolidation + flat atomic CommitIndex

ConcurrentHandle refactor (begin_concurrent.rs):
- Consolidate four separate collections (write_set HashMap, freed_pages
  HashSet, conflict_only_pages HashSet, page_locks HashSet) into a
  single HashMap<PageNumber, PageTxnState>.  Each PageTxnState tracks
  staged_data, is_freed, is_conflict_only, and held_lock in one struct.
- Add WriteSetView, HeldLocksView, and FreedPagesView types that
  provide read-only projections over page_states without exposing the
  internal representation.
- Update all concurrent_prepare_write_page, concurrent_stage,
  concurrent_restore, concurrent_free, and commit/abort paths to use
  the unified PageTxnState map.
- Reduces per-page bookkeeping from 4 separate hash lookups to 1.

Flat atomic CommitIndex (core_types.rs):
- Add a 65536-entry AtomicU64 flat array to CommitIndex for O(1) reads.
  For page numbers 1..=65536, latest() is now a single
  AtomicU64::load(Acquire) — no locks, no RwLock, no HashMap probe, no
  reader-count tracking.  Inspired by MICA (Lim et al., NSDI 2014):
  when keys are bounded integers, replace hash maps with direct-indexed
  arrays.
- The existing LeftRight sharded path is preserved as fallback for page
  numbers beyond 65536 and for len()/debug.
- update() writes to both the flat array and shards for consistency.
- debug_assert! guards against CommitSeq(0) which is used as the "empty"
  sentinel in the flat array.
- 512 KiB memory cost (negligible on the 499 GiB benchmark machine).

Other MVCC updates:
- lib.rs: re-export new view types and PageTxnState helpers.
- ssi_anomaly_tests.rs: update tests for &mut handle API.
- mvcc_bench.rs: update benchmarks for new ConcurrentHandle API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,9 +56,10 @@ mod ssi_anomaly_tests;
 pub use begin_concurrent::{
     ConcurrentHandle, ConcurrentPageState, ConcurrentRegistry, ConcurrentSavepoint, FcwResult,
     MAX_CONCURRENT_WRITERS, PreparedConcurrentCommit, SharedConcurrentHandle, SsiResult,
-    concurrent_abort, concurrent_commit, concurrent_commit_with_ssi, concurrent_free_page,
-    concurrent_page_is_freed, concurrent_page_state, concurrent_read_page,
-    concurrent_restore_page_state, concurrent_rollback_to_savepoint, concurrent_savepoint,
+    concurrent_abort, concurrent_clear_page_state, concurrent_commit, concurrent_commit_with_ssi,
+    concurrent_free_page, concurrent_page_is_freed, concurrent_page_state,
+    concurrent_prepare_write_page, concurrent_read_page, concurrent_restore_page_state,
+    concurrent_rollback_to_savepoint, concurrent_savepoint, concurrent_stage_prepared_write_page,
     concurrent_track_write_conflict_page, concurrent_write_page,
     finalize_prepared_concurrent_commit_with_ssi, is_concurrent_mode,
     prepare_concurrent_commit_with_ssi, validate_first_committer_wins,
